sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n19640" key="batraxomuomaxi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">βᾰτρᾰχομῠομᾰχία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n19640.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">battle of the frogs and mice,</tr_> title of mockepic poem ascribed to Homer, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.873f</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
